summary: Completed full e2e testing of IMSI Catcher Detector application. All backend APIs (12/12) and frontend UI components tested successfully. Dark security-themed dashboard working correctly with threat monitoring, cell tower info, signal charts, and settings management.
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - proper async/await usage, Pydantic models for validation, proper error handling
Cell data is simulated (EXPECTED) - not from real device but uses realistic values and real threat detection logic
All data-testid attributes properly added to UI components for testing
MongoDB _id properly excluded from API responses using {'_id': 0} projection
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - app generates simulated cell tower data dynamically
context_for_next_testing_agent: All APIs working. Dashboard updates every 5 seconds when monitoring is active. 15% chance of injecting threat for testing purposes. Settings persist to MongoDB. Clear data button removes all cell records and threat events.

frontend_components: ThreatGauge - displays threat score and level ✓

simulated_data_note: Cell tower data is SIMULATED on the backend for web demo purposes. This is expected behavior as per the requirements - not from real device but uses realistic values and threat detection engine.
